response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified video as a Hololive countdown medley featuring multiple songs. 2. Performed scene breakdown: 00:00-00:18 intro, 00:18-01:57 'FG ROADSTER', 01:57-04:47 'フィーリングラデーション', 04:47-05:00 'Our Bright Parade'. 3. Searched for official composers/songwriters for each song (Luna/Pocyomukin/Joe Ogawa/Foux for FG ROADSTER, Oh Tora/Maeshima Soshi for Feeling Radation, Shota Horie for Our Bright Parade). 4. Searched and found full lyrics for all songs using the provided search tool. 5. Constructed final JSON output ensuring all fields and formatting requirements are met.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert countdown medley performance by VTubers from Hololive. It includes performances of 'FG ROADSTER' by ReGLOSS, 'フィーリングラデーション' (Feeling Radation) by ReGLOSS and guests, and a final group performance of 'Our Bright Parade'.

scenes.description: Introductory greeting and setup for the performance.
Performance of 'FG ROADSTER' by the VTuber unit ReGLOSS. Text 'Music: Luna, Pocyomukin, Joe Ogawa, Foux' appears.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro]
Oh, oh

[Verse 1: 響咲リオナ & 輪堂千速]
搭載V8エンジン
第7感持ってる原人
6するこの世界と全人類
この5人でゲームをチェンジ
唸る4輪発射セヨ
皆さん3キュー사랑해요
操る2台のturntable
獲る1番ここground 0

[Verse 2: 虎金妃笑虎 & 水宮枢]
Aye, リスク超えて挑戦
チャンスもセットだ当然
登り上げる頂点
座布団積んでく笑点
乗り込むFG ROADSTER
特殊部隊集合能力者
この歴史に名を彫る彫刻家
ぶっちぎりで置き去り後続車

[Verse 3: 綺々羅々ヴィヴィ, 響咲リオナ & 全]
今高速でぶち抜けて
いく大気圏
エンジンからジェットの炎
揺れている怪気炎
眼下に広がる大地を
越えていく回帰線
バックミラーにbig blue
が写っているI+B+M (Fire!)

[Verse 4: 虎金妃笑虎 & 輪堂千速]
打ち上げ台から飛んでく
うちら世代この燃料
朽ち果てないです
銀河で寿司食べたい
見えてるでかいビジョン
燃えてるメンバー一同
ただいま現在進行形
越えてく世界規模
叶うはずだwon't stop, 心臓がモンスター
aliens, turn it up, FG party hard
光るTesla roadster, heavy booster
目覚めていく本能青い炎 (woo, woo)
B+F+F, let's go out, so, get in the car
0から宇宙まで囚われず
走るFG ROADSTER, 唸るbooster
Flow Glow, the sp+ce to be, 今chase me (hey)

[Verse 5: 水宮枢 & 綺々羅々ヴィヴィ]
ターボ付きスーパーカー
ハンドル捌きはシューマッハ
副操縦士はチューバッカ
次元が違う連中ばっか
Aye, コーナー攻めてるギリギリ
モーター全開地響き
空から導き
お肌がピチピチ

[Verse 6: 輪堂千速 & 響咲リオナ]
タイヤ焦がしてドーナツターン
弾け飛んでくドラム缶
顧客満足度高くて
ぶち上がってるお客さん
0から最高到達点
ためてる太陽光発電
探索するこの小惑星
超覚醒突入ボーナスステージ

[Verse 7: 虎金妃笑虎 & 綺々羅々ヴィヴィ]
一直線伸びてる道路
vibrationエンジンの鼓動
速度増し上がってる高度
限界、重力、凌駕し上昇
開拓しまくってくフロンティア
旅立つroadster, only one
アクセル踏み込んでくドンピシャ
飛んでく日本遺産

[Verse 8: 水宮枢 & 響咲リオナ]
1億馬力の重低音
火星のホテルが休憩所
並んで走行U+F+O
降り立つ宇宙ステーション
物語を継承, aye
まるで旧約聖書, aye
この先何世紀も成長
生き延びて結果出す, take off
叶うはずだwon't stop, 心臓がモンスター
aliens turn it up, FG party hard
光るTesla roadster, heavy booster
目覚めていく本能青い炎 (woo, woo)
B+F+F, let's go out, so, get in the car
0から宇宙まで囚われず
走るFG ROADSTER, 唸るbooster
Flow Glow, the sp+ce to be, 今chase me (hey)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Intro]
Yeah, yeah

[Verse 1: Isaki Riona, Rindo Chihaya]
Packin' a V8 engine
And a seventh sense for things
Six ways to Sunday, the world'll be rocking
With us five, the game be changing
Burn the four wheels, floor the pedal
Thank you all three-fold, sarang hae yo
Spinning two turntables like a pro
Becoming number one, starting here, ground zero

[Verse 2: Koganei Niko, Mizumiya Su]
Ayy, face the risks and stand up
The come with chances, you can't mess up
Going to the top, all the way up
We even bring the laughs in stand-up
Jumping into a FG roadster
We got a special unit full of espers
We make history, the world's a beholder
Leaving in the dust, anyone slower

[Verse 3: Kikirara Vivi, Isaki Riona, All]
Speeding through the stratosphere
Our jet engines' thrusting, the flamboyance of pioneers
Below us, the world unfolding, crossing the tropics down there
Seeing the big blue in the rear view, IBM (Fire!)

[Verse 4: Koganei Niko, Rindo Chihaya]
Taking off from the launch pad, this is our generation
Our tanks won't ever empty, be glad
We wanna eat sushi in a space station
We got a massive vision
All of us burning with passion
And as of this moment
We're going above and beyond

[Chorus]
Dreams come true, we won't stop, our hearts are a monster
Aliens, turn it up, FG party hard
Blingin' Tesla roadster, heavy booster
Awakening the instincts, blue blazes (woo, woo)
BFF, let's go out, so get in the car
Prisoners to nothing, from naught to all creation
Speeding the FG roadster, hitting that booster
Flow Glow, the space to be, now chase me (hey)

[Verse 5: Mizumiya Su, Kikirara Vivi]
A turbocharged supercar
And skills like Schumacher
Co-driver is Chewbacca
Not on my level are these suckers
Braking at the last minute
The motors whining to keep with it
A lead from the sky, it's complicit
Skin like Venus, we bring it

[Verse 6: Rindo Chihaya, Isaki Riona]
Tires smoking during a donut
Barrels flying up and about
The people love it
Crowd's going nuts
Going from zero to max
Charged up on solar, so relax
We're exploring this planet
We hit the bonus stage, now to smash it

[Verse 7: Koganei Niko, Kikirara Vivi]
A straight road to the horizon
Can feel the engine's vibration
Speed going up, acceleration
Shaking off our limits and gravity, we're a sensation
We're terraforming the frontier
The roadster is the only one pioneer
Putting the pedal to the metal
We Japanese heritages open a portal

[Verse 8: Mizumiya Su, Isaki Riona]
The bass packs a billion HP
A hotel on Mars is our break room
As the UFOs race in space
Get a visit from the space station
Continuing the story, ayy
Like the testaments, old to new, ayy
For centuries, we'll have all the glory
To survive and leave a mark, take off

[Chorus]
Dreams come true, we won't stop, our hearts are a monster
Aliens, turn it up, FG party hard
Blingin' Tesla roadster, heavy booster
Awakening the instincts, blue blazes (woo, woo)
BFF, let's go out, so get in the car
Prisoners to nothing, from naught to all creation
Speeding the FG roadster, hitting that booster
Flow Glow, the space to be, now chase me (hey)

scenes.description: Performance of 'フィーリングラデーション' (Feeling Radation) by ReGLOSS and guests. Text 'Music: Oh Tora, Maeshima Soshi' appears.
scenes.song_title: フィーリングラデーション (Feeling Radation)

視界の霧は晴れ渡って
悲しみに別れを告げる
酸いも甘いも宙に放り出して
滲む空インクは薔薇色

キミがいなければ
何の意味もない

針の落ちないレコードさ

たった今止め処ない追い風背にして
come on, let's roll
颯爽と吹き荒れる向かい風にも

フライングしたってalright
restart line!! (hey!!)
ときめいてしまえば

ひとつひとつすべてがドラマ

restart line!! (hey!!)

満ち溢れるフィーリングラデーション

始まりのその時が来た
nothing is impossible
マヤカシ誤魔化し効かない世界
この先はまだ誰も知らない正解
傍観してるだけじゃ味気ない
リアルタイムで通じ合って
振り子にかけるエモーション
後の祭りでもi don't mind
大胆不敵なシチュエーション
行けるところまで行ってみたい
選択肢にないget off on the way
共に声を鳴らせ
素肌を貫くような
真っ直ぐな痛みが伴っても
この仲間たちと最果てまで
keep running to the end

飛び乗ってto the future
フライングしたってalright
restart line!! (hey!!)
ときめいてしまえば

ひとつひとつすべてがドラマ
待ち侘びたdaybreak
restart line!! (hey!!)
代わる代わる彩るパノラマ
満ち溢れるフィーリングラデーション

飛び出せyou raise me up

restart line!! (hey!!)

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Verse 1]
My heart starts skipping a beat
A new chapter unfolded
Show time, the styles changing
An imagination that's not bad at all
The fog in my field of vision has cleared
Saying goodbye to sadness
Throwing both sweet and bitter into space
The ink bleeding into the sky is rose-colored
No matter how well I try to魅せ it (Hey!!)
If you weren't here
It wouldn't mean anything
An illusion that doesn't even leave a scratch (Hey!!)
A record needle that won't drop

[Pre-Chorus]
Just now, with the endless tailwind at my back
Come on, let's roll
Letting my heart flutter
Even against the dashing headwinds

[Chorus]
Jumping on to the future
Flying is alright, restart line!! (Hey!!)
If I get excited
A liberated zone expands in an instant
Everything one by one is a drama
The long-awaited daybreak
Restart line!! (Hey!!)
Changing panoramas coloring the view
A overflowing Feeling Radation

[Verse 2]
The moment of the beginning has come
Nothing is impossible
A world where tricks and deceptions don't work
The correct answer that no one knows yet lies ahead
It's boring just to watch from the sidelines
Connecting in real-time
Emotions hung on a pendulum
Even if it's too late, I don't mind
An audacious situation
I want to go as far as I can go
Get off on the way, not in the options
Let's raise our voices together
Even if accompanied by straight pain
That pierces the skin
Until the end of the world with these friends
Keep running to the end

[Chorus]
Jumping on to the future
Flying is alright, restart line!! (Hey!!)
If I get excited
A liberated zone expands in an instant
Everything one by one is a drama
The long-awaited daybreak
Restart line!! (Hey!!)
Changing panoramas coloring the view
A overflowing Feeling Radation

[Outro]
Jump out, you raise me up
There is nothing to fear
Restart line!! (Hey!!)
The beautiful sunrise
Illuminates the opaque tomorrow
Restart line!! (Hey!!)
Restart line!! (Hey!!)

scenes.description: Performance of 'Our Bright Parade'. Text 'Music: Shota Horie' appears.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Parade, parade, parade)
Parade, parade, parade!
(輝くんだよ 呼び合う声を合図に)
輝くんだよ 呼び合う声を合図に
(Parade, parade, parade)
Parade, parade, parade!
(探しにゆく スタートは何度だって)
探しにゆく スタートは何度だって
(ただ独り言を綴った)
ただ独り言を綴った
(ただ始まりたくて走った)
ただ始まりたくて走った
(遠く暗がりに灯った)
遠く暗がりに灯った
(それは眩し過ぎた名前)
それは眩し過ぎた名前
(それは優し過ぎる思い出もっと)
それは優し過ぎる思い出もっと
(近づけと手を伸ばした)
近づけと手を伸ばした
(思いがけず結び合った)
思いがけず結び合った
(ほら今)
ほら今
(迷子には)
迷子は
(僕等になった)
“僕等”になった

(Parade, parade, parade)
Parade, parade, parade!
(輝くんだよ)
輝くんだよ
(悔しさも愛しさも連れておいで)
悔しさも愛しさも連れておいで
(風 夢 羽)
風、夢、羽
(飛び立てるさ)
飛び立てるさ
(ささやかな祈りは光)
ささやかな祈りは光
(終わりなき兆し)
終わりなき兆し
(君を見つけたこと)
君を見つけたこと
(胸を張れるよ)
胸を張れるよ
(ここから)
ここから
(これから)
これから
(Our bright parade, parade!)
Our bright parade, parade!

(まだ頼りない予感を)
まだ頼りない予感を
(歌おう恥ずかしくなんてないよ)
歌おう恥ずかしくなんてないよ
(誰も解けないイマジナリー)
誰も解けないイマジナリー
(いつかまた逢えるおまじない)
いつかまた逢えるおまじない
(あの日ゼロに始まったストーリー)
あの日ゼロに始まったストーリー
(数え切れない言の葉)
数え切れない言の葉
(数えるような想いじゃないさ)
数えるような想いじゃないさ
(ほら今)
ほら今
(僕等を)
“僕等”を
(一つと呼ぼう)
一つと呼ぼう

(Parade, parade, parade)
Parade, parade, parade!
(美しいんだよ)
美しいんだよ
(許し合える刹那)
許し合える刹那
(夜はきらめく)
夜はきらめく
(雨 晴れ カレイド)
雨、晴れ、カレイド
(またとない空)
またとない空
(相応しい旅路とは)
相応しい旅路とは
(君と在ることさ)
君と在ることさ
(君と在ることなんだ)
君と在ることなんだ
(ただいまを聞けば)
“ただいま”を聞けば
(おかえりって叫ぶよ)
“おかえり”って叫ぶよ
(当たり前じゃないか)
当たり前じゃないか
(Parade, parade, parade)
Parade, parade, parade!
(輝くんだよ)
輝くんだよ
(暗がりを満たすのは)
暗がりを満たすのは
(君だ僕だ！)
君だ僕だ！
(Parade, parade, parade)
Parade, parade, parade!
(輝くんだよ)
輝くんだよ
(悔しさも愛しさも連れておいで)
悔しさも愛しさも連れておいで
(風 夢 羽)
風、夢、羽
(飛び立てるさ)
飛び立てるさ
(ささやかな祈りは光)
ささやかな祈りは光
(終わりなき兆し)
終わりなき兆し
(君と飛び込んでゆく)
君と飛び込んでゆく
(素敵なスタートさ)
素敵なスタートさ

(Our bright parade, parade!)
Our bright parade, parade!
(Our bright parade, parade!)

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Intro: All]
Parade, parade, parade
It's time to take the stage
I hear the voices calling out your name
Parade, parade, parade
A new journey awaits
Just hit reset and we can start again

[Verse 1: Shiori, Bijou, Nerissa, Fuwawa, Mococo]
I weave lonely words into echoes
I run because I heard a voice say, “Go”
Far away, lighting up all the darkness
It's a name, shining for us to notice
Memories that fill us up with kindness and love

[Pre-Chorus: Shiori & Nerissa & Fuwawa, Bijou & Mococo, All]
You reach out and tell me to come close
Let's surprise people who don't know
Every one that they called “the lost”
Here we are as “us”

[Chorus: All]
Parade, parade, parade
It's time to take the stage
When disappointment gets in your way
Love will shine, keeping you safe
Feel the wind and wishes
Your wings will take you high
These silent prayers will become our light
Guiding us on an endless flight

[Post-Chorus: All]
Finally, we found each other
I can stand tall and say
Starting from here, starting right now
Our bright parade, parade

[Verse 2: Mococo, Nerissa, Bijou, Fuwawa, Shiori]
We sing, full of uncertain feelings
We sing, and we're not afraid of what they think
No one can decode what we're imagining
They don't know our magic and our destiny
When we met, this was an empty story, but now

[Pre-Chorus: Shiori & Nerissa & Fuwawa, Bijou & Mococo, All]
Too many words to count them all out
Feelings that leave no room for doubt
Take a look at where we are now
All together as “one”

[Chorus: All]
Parade, parade, parade
It's all so beautiful
The moments of forgiveness shining
Lighting up the darkest night
Rain or shine, I'll treasure
A kaleidoscope sky
A journey that is made just for us
And here I am, right by your side

[Bridge: All, Fuwamoco, Shiori & Bijou & Nerissa]
'Cause there you are, standing by my side
When you're back and open that door
You'll hear us saying, “Welcome home”
Forever we'll be waiting

[Chorus: All]
Parade, parade, parade
It's time to take the stage
We're gonna shine right through the darkness
Open up, share your light
Parade, parade, parade
It's time to take the stage
When disappointment gets in your way
Love will shine, keeping you safe
Feel the wind and wishes
Your wings will take you high
These silent prayers will become our light
Guiding us on an endless flight

[Post-Chorus: All]
Here I am ready to dive into
A beautiful start with you
Starting from here, starting right now
Our bright parade, parade

[Outro: All]
Our bright parade, parade
